items.name: StyleConfig
items.comment: Visual style for one playback state of an interlude indicator.

fields.name: color
fields.comment: Dot color for this playback state.

fields.name: opacity
fields.comment: Dot opacity for this playback state.

items.name: StateConfig
items.comment: Inactive and active styles of an interlude indicator.

fields.name: normal
fields.comment: Style before and after the interlude is active.

fields.name: active
fields.comment: Style progressively filled while the interlude is active.

items.name: Root
items.comment: Geometry and state styles of instrumental-gap indicators.
